last_planning_summary: The v0.2 plan centers authoring on model-user conversation after ni init. ni-start maintains docs/plan and .ni/contract.json together; ni status reports deterministic readiness gaps; ni-end confirms and locks; ni-run compiles a bounded handoff prompt. User-facing contract add/list/set commands are not the primary authoring UX.

recent_decisions.title: v0.2 primary authoring UX is model-user conversation, not contract editing commands

recent_risks.title: CLI contract editing displaces conversation authoring

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
